These vibrant and quirky treats are perfect for satisfying sweet cravings and adding a playful touch to any occasion.

This bulk 24-count box offers excellent value, making it easy to share the joy. Each individually wrapped gummy pizza ensures freshness and convenience, perfect for on-the-go enjoyment or distributing at events. Bring a smile to faces with the irresistible charm of Gummi Zone Pizza
description: Product description Get ready to unbox a whole lot of fun with the Gummi Zone Pizza 24 Pack! Each individual pack contains a deliciously chewy, fruit-flavored gummy candy shaped just like a miniature pizza. These vibrant and quirky treats are perfect for satisfying sweet cravings and adding a playful touch to any occasion. Whether you're stocking up for party favors, filling loot bags, creating an eye-catching candy buffet, or simply looking for a unique and tasty snack, these gummy pizzas are sure to be a hit. Kids and adults alike will love the novelty and delightful chewiness of each "slice." This bulk 24-count box offers excellent value, making it easy to share the joy. Each individually wrapped gummy pizza ensures freshness and convenience, perfect for on-the-go enjoyment or distributing at events. Bring a smile to faces with the irresistible charm of Gummi Zone Pizza! Ingredients Glucose Syrup: A primary sweetener and provides the chewy texture. Sugar: Another main sweetener. Water: To dissolve other ingredients and create the jelly consistency. Gelatine: This is what gives gummy candies their characteristic chewy, jiggly texture. For Gummi Zone Pizza, it's typically Beef Gelatine. (For vegetarian/vegan options, other gelling agents like pectin or carrageenan would be used instead). Apple Juice (from concentrate): Contributes to the fruity flavor. Humectant (e.g., Sorbitol Syrup): Helps to retain moisture and keep the sweets soft. Acids (e.g., Citric Acid, Lactic Acid): Provide a tart or tangy flavor and also help with preservation. Flavourings: Artificial or natural flavorings to create the various fruit tastes. Glazing Agents (e.g., Beeswax, Carnauba Wax): Give the gummies a shiny, non-sticky finish. Colours: Food colorings (both natural and artificial, often with E-numbers) to give the sweets their vibrant appearance. Common examples seen for Gummi Zone Pizza include E100, E120, E141, E150c, E160. Some listings also mention E102, E110, E129, E171. Hydrolysed Pea Protein / Milk Protein: Some variations may include these for texture or other properties.
